title: avena alba var. hirtula
intro: Avena alba var. hirtula, also known as hairy oat grass, is a subspecies of the wild oat plant, characterized by its hairy leaves and stems. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of Avena alba var. hirtula include promoting relaxation, reducing anxiety and stress, and aiding in sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Avena alba var. hirtula often take the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and promote a restful night's sleep.
